engine: Company Intelligence Engine (Hikma Company Analysis Layer)
principle: Deterministic Python computes all scores from the 304-node graph + Mizan engine; Claude writes only grounded prose. No module invents a score. Every numeric output traces to a graph node or a CompanyProfile field. scholar_review gating preserved end-to-end.

modules.graph_traversal: For each ingested fact, classify into SAY/DO/SHOW buckets; attach provenance; index claims to graph concept nodes via keyword+embedding match against node short_definition/positive/risk signals.
modules.scoring_logic: Deterministic: confidence grade per fact (verified|analyst-reviewed|ai-seeded|model-estimate) from source type; NO scoring of the company here.
modules.explainability: Each downstream number cites the evidence_id(s) it rests on.
modules.uncertainty_handling: Facts failing provenance -> flagged, excluded from scoring, routed to review. Missing SHOW for a SAY -> disclosure-gap flag.

outputs: stakeholder set (incl. voiceless: future generations, ecosystems, the poor)
modules.graph_traversal: Traverse from sector to affected-party nodes (workers->ajr/worker_dignity; communities->miskeen/community_benefit; nature->ard/maa/biodiversity_protection; future->nasl/maqasid_hifz_nasl).
modules.scoring_logic: Deterministic salience weighting; vulnerability multiplier from vulnerability_impact_engine logic.
modules.explainability: Each stakeholder links to the graph node(s) that justify its inclusion.
modules.uncertainty_handling: Unmapped affected parties flagged as blind-spot risk.

outputs: activated principle nodes with relevance + confidence
modules.graph_traversal: Match evidence to principle nodes (adl,zulm,amanah,fasad,riba,israf,...); pull each node's quranic_basis (with its direct/inferred/modern label preserved) and related_nodes for context expansion.
modules.scoring_logic: Deterministic activation score per principle = evidence_strength x node_relevance; carries node confidence_level.
modules.explainability: Returns the labelled relevance string so a direct principle is never presented as more certain than an inferred one.
modules.uncertainty_handling: Low-evidence principle activations marked; interpretive ones inherit scholar_review_required=true.

modules.graph_traversal: For each harm node activated, gather corroborating SHOW evidence; run harm_prevention_gate (serious/irreversible -> hard flag, not tradable).
modules.scoring_logic: Deterministic: reuse MizanResult.harm_reduction (inverted) + pollution_level base + controversy_risk; greenwashing from benefit_harm_triangulator SAY-SHOW gap.
modules.explainability: Each harm cites the SHOW evidence and the graph harm-node.
modules.uncertainty_handling: Harm asserted in SAY but uncorroborated by SHOW -> 'unverified harm/greenwash' flag, not scored as fact.

modules.graph_traversal: Activate benefit nodes; require DO/SHOW corroboration before counting a claimed (SAY) benefit; distinguish public value created from private value captured.
modules.scoring_logic: Deterministic: MizanResult.public_benefit + corroborated-benefit ratio; downgrade SAY-only benefits.
modules.explainability: Each benefit cites the action/evidence proving realisation, not just the claim.
modules.uncertainty_handling: Claimed benefit without DO/SHOW -> 'aspirational, unrealised' tag.

modules.graph_traversal: Weigh benefit vs harm under hard constraints; lower objectives cannot override higher Maqasid or red lines.
modules.scoring_logic: Deterministic: maslahah-mafsadah weighting with Maqasid priority lexicographic over tradable goods.
modules.explainability: Verdict shows which benefits and harms drove it, by node.
modules.uncertainty_handling: If harm/benefit rests on low-confidence evidence, verdict carries an uncertainty band and review trigger.

modules.graph_traversal: Traverse stewardship cluster; test whether resources are managed as accountable trust vs liquidated as income.
modules.scoring_logic: Deterministic: reuse MizanResult.stewardship_score + env field deltas; depletion booked as loss.
modules.uncertainty_handling: Thin environmental disclosure -> low evidence_confidence, flagged not guessed.

modules.graph_traversal: Traverse governance cluster; map accountability chain; scan for corruption, conflicts, capture, disclosure gaps.
modules.uncertainty_handling: Opaque governance -> flagged as risk, not assumed clean.

modules.graph_traversal: Traverse future cluster; weight irreversible and long-horizon effects; ledger what is passed to the next generation.
modules.scoring_logic: Deterministic: discounted long-horizon harm-benefit with irreversibility premium; no zero-discounting of distant harm.
modules.uncertainty_handling: Long-horizon projection uncertainty -> scenario band + review.

modules.graph_traversal: Orchestrate: assemble the fact-pack (all module outputs + Mizan) and route to the prose layer; bind to the matching decision pathway if the subject is a project/decision.
modules.scoring_logic: Deterministic composite (reuses companies/compass.py weighting: mizan-dominant blend); Claude writes prose only.
modules.explainability: Numeric-validation guard: reject any Claude number not in the fact-pack; every finding cites facts_used ids.
modules.uncertainty_handling: Aggregate confidence = min/weighted of module confidences; low -> review-required banner.
modules.reuses_existing: companies/compass.py build_compass; audit/ai.py client + grounding prompt

modules.graph_traversal: Apex synthesis above the Compass; integrate long-horizon + uncertainty; defer interpretive/contested points to scholar review; NEVER issue a ruling.
modules.scoring_logic: Deterministic gating only (no new score); routes, never decides.
modules.explainability: Surfaces residual uncertainty and the limits of machine judgement explicitly.
modules.uncertainty_handling: Anything interpretive or low-confidence -> scholar_review_workflow; output marked decision-support, not advice.

cross_cutting.scoring_rule: All scores deterministic Python; reuse mizan/scoring.py MizanResult as the validated 6-dim spine; graph adds principle activation + Maqasid + future weighting.
cross_cutting.explainability_rule: Every output node-cites (graph node id) and evidence-cites (evidence_id); ayah_index provides verse provenance with its original direct/inferred/modern label.
cross_cutting.uncertainty_rule: evidence_confidence_grader + uncertainty_review_router gate every module; scholar_review_required propagates from any activated interpretive node; final output is decision-support, never a ruling.
cross_cutting.say_do_show: Triangulation runs through evidence_collector -> harm/benefit engines so claimed (SAY) is never scored as realised without DO/SHOW corroboration.
